TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Yungkilu, title = Yungkilu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yungkilu} }

S.FORM: Yungkilu i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Yungkilu. u kasalumaluma' nu Yungkilu sa, 123 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 363 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 345 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 18 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 88%, Tayal 1%, Rukai 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: juŋkir~ɾu i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu juŋkir~ɾu. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu juŋkir~ɾu sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, tajar~ɾ *%, *ukai *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: Yungkilu i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Yungkilu. u kasalumaluma' nu Yungkilu sa, 123 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 363 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 345 ku tademaw, pakalatu 95%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 18 ku tademaw, pakalatu 5%. u kasabinacadan, Paiwan 88%, Tayal 1%, Rukai 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: juŋkir~ɾu i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu juŋkir~ɾu. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu juŋkir~ɾu sa, *** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, *** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, *** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, paiwan **%, tajar~ɾ *%, *ukai *%, zumazuma *%.
